_doc: Potential definitions (1-5). Text descriptions from wiki; structured effects to be added.

potentials.description: 通过技能恢复技力后，攻击力+10%，持续10秒，该效果最多叠加5层

effects.note: On SP recovery from skill → ATK+10%, 10s, max 5 stacks

potentials.name: 正向反馈

potentials.description: 施放终结技小队，集结！期间，全队攻击力+10%

effects.note: Implemented in carrierConsumptionHandlers: registerAkekuriUltimateBuffs P3 branch

potentials.description: 终结技小队，集结！所需的终结技能量-10%
potentials.name: 满分状态

potentials.description: 天赋心流时间效果加强：连击在终结技小队，集结！结束后还会持续5秒。

effects.note: Implemented in carrierConsumptionHandlers: registerAkekuriUltimateBuffs P5 branch (+5s)

potentials.name: 残心节奏
